feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Annotation @AbapCatalog.extensibility.allowNewDatasources: false is not working in ABAP CDS
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am trying to create a CDS view extension on CDS View Entity /DMO/E_Agency. It looks like the following - 

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#PROJECTION_LIST]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Agency - Extension Include View'

@AbapCatalog.extensibility: {
  extensible: true,
  elementSuffix: 'ZAG',
  allowNewDatasources: false,
  dataSources: ['Agency'],
  quota: {
    maximumFields: 500,
    maximumBytes: 50000
  }
}
define view entity /DMO/E_Agency
  as select from /dmo/agency as Agency
{
  key agency_id as AgencyId
}

Here allowNewDatasources: false means I can't select data from other data source but I have written the following view extension wherein I am associating data from another custom table zzextenagent_swa.

extend view entity /DMO/E_Agency 
       with association to zzextenagent_swa as _zzswas 
    on $projection.AgencyId = _zzswas.agencyid       
{     
     _zzswas      
}

And now I am able to include my custom table field to the main CDS view like below. 

extend view entity /DMO/R_AgencyTP with {
    _Extension._zzswas.zagswascity as ZZSWASCITYZAG
}

Here /DMO/R_AgencyTP looks like below where /DMO/E_Agency works as an extension include view.

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Agency'
@Search.searchable: true

@AbapCatalog.extensibility: {
  extensible: true,
  elementSuffix: 'ZAG',
  allowNewDatasources: false,
  dataSources: ['_Extension'],
  quota: {
    maximumFields: 500,
    maximumBytes: 50000
  },
  allowNewCompositions: true
}

define root view entity /DMO/R_AgencyTP
  as select from /DMO/I_Agency as Agency
  association [0..1] to I_Country     as _Country   on $projection.CountryCode = _Country.Country
  association [1]    to /DMO/E_Agency as _Extension on $projection.AgencyID = _Extension.AgencyId
{
....

Essentially I am able to add my custom table fields to this standard CDS view despite allowNewDatasources: false.

So, my question is then is this annotation not working correctly or I am misunderstanding something here. Tagging experts @Andre_Fischer @OlgaDolinskaja @CarineTchoutouo @ThomasSchneider 

Thanks,
Mainak

entry.title: Instance creation failed - abap trial
entry.content:
Hello,

I am unable to create instance for abap trial

email id - grvsetu3@gmail.com

@SAPSupport can you fix this. why these errors are frequent? 10 minutes of tutorials taking days and weeks

entry.title: Enhancement in VF01 SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

I am new to public cloud development having doubt in implementing enhancement in VF01 SAP public cloud 

requirement is to store the invoice values into a custom table and and send to the invoice details to external API.

how to achieve this .

Do we have to create a BADI or any exist available in Public cloud as in ECC or S4HANA system

or do we have any other alternatives?

please suggest.

Guru

entry.title: Couldn't create an instance of service 'ABAP environment' with plan 'shared'.
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to create an instance of ABAP ENVIRONMENT, but the following error is occurring:

"Couldn't create an instance of service 'ABAP environment' with plan 'shared'."

"Service broker error: Service broker abap-trial-broker failed with: Internal Server Error"

I'm using a Trial account and I haven't created any instances yet.

Does anyone know how to solve this problem?

entry.title: Can SAP Standard Function Module be migrated to SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Are SAP FMs be availabe in SAP BTP already or it needs to be migrated? What is the process?
If a customized Function Module calls another through RFC call in another system, can both of these be migrated to SAP BTP. How?
SAP KB links will be helpful

entry.title: What are other connectivity options apart from SAP Integration Suite in Private cloud edition
entry.content: Hi Everyone, I want to know about connectivity options from sap to non sap legacy system in Private cloud edition. Integration Suite is not in picture. So what else we can recommend as offerings from SAP BTP Platform?

entry.title: Batch at PO component level is not updated/assigned using SAP standard API for Purchase Order
entry.content: Using API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV Batch is not getting updated at PO Subcontracting level.

entry.title: How to Use Standard SAP Tables (BKPF, BSEG) in CDS Views with ABAP Cloud Programming on SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently learning SAP BTP and working with SAP ABAP Cloud Programming for the first time in Eclipse. While creating a CDS View, I noticed that I couldn’t use standard SAP tables like BKPF or BSEG directly in the CDS View.

During my research on how to use standard SAP tables in ABAP Cloud Programming, I found that these tables need to be released first before they can be used in the cloud environment.

Could someone please explain how to release these tables for use in the cloud? Or is there another recommended way to access standard table data in SAP BTP / ABAP Cloud?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Eclipse ABAP ADT - New Cloud Project - No option for 'SAP BTP ABAP Environment'
entry.content:
I've installed latest Eclipse and ABAP ADT. I did the pre-reqs specified here https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/#abap

However when I go to create an ABAP Cloud project I don't see an option to choose 'SAP BTP ABAP Environment'.

I only see 'Specify the ABAP service instance for connecting to the cloud environment.' ABAP service Instance URL.

I've attached image of expected popup with BTP option as well as the screen I get where its missing. Also is my Eclipse and ADT version.

entry.title: I can not open Service Binding in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am starting to practice with BPT from Eclipse using ADT. When I try to open a Service Binding to publish it, I can not access the information, throwing instead the following error:

java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "com.sap.adt.util.ui.databinding.DatabindingSectionComposite$DatabindingSectionPart.getSection()" because "this.bindingTypeInfoSectionPart" is null

Could anyone guide me? I searches and found that maybe an update is needed, but I have not privileges to do that. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Not able to find /LRN/S4D400_EXERCISE package
entry.content: I'm currently going through the Acquiring Core ABAP Skills course. As part of the exercises, I'm required to use the package /LRN/S4D400_EXERCISE. However, I'm unable to find this package in the system, despite following all the steps correctly. Could you please guide me on how to access or add this package?

entry.title: Best Approach ABAP BTP and SAP S/4 hana Public Clouc Integration
entry.content:
HI Guys, i would like to know that is the best approach for followiung scenarion:

Im devoping a RAP application on ABAP BTP (header/item), during save/post i will call and API on my public cloud to create a Document.

On my Header/Items i have standart fields like Company(Bukrs), Mateiral(MATNR), Account(HKONT).

What is the best approach to retrieve search helps for that fields based on my backend sap s/4hana Public Cloud System?

thanks

entry.title: Create System on SAP BTP
entry.content:
I created a Trial account in SAP BTP, my idea is to be able to create an AddOn as a POC, I created a subaccount and ran the "Prepare an Account for ABAP Trial" Booster, the next step would be to Create System in the subaccount instance, but I can't find how to do this, I understand that it is necessary, because it will send me the email with the access link to the ABAP system.
Can you help me with this?

entry.title: SAP FIORI | Timestamp conversion in fiori front end
entry.content:
Hi SAP  Experts,

I've created a timestamp column in the backend by concatenating the creation date (VBAK-ERDAT) and creation time (VBAK-ERZET). The resulting timestamp is in the format YYYYMMDDHHMMSS, and the values are being generated as expected.

Example:

  • Creation Date: April 25, 2025 (20250425)
  • Creation Time: 5:14:06 AM (051406)
  • Timestamp (backend): 20250425051406

    However, after exposing the CDS view through a Fiori application, the timestamp displayed on the frontend appears to have an additional ~5.5 hours added to it.

    Frontend Example:

    • Timestamp displayed: April 25, 2025, 10:44:06 AM (20250425104406)

      It seems that the SAP Gateway or the Fiori frontend is performing a timezone conversion on the timestamp value.

      As per SAP Note 3215029, this behavior aligns with the standard design. The timestamp shown in UI5 applications may differ from backend values depending on the browser's timezone settings.

      Has anyone else encountered a similar issue? Any suggestions or best practices to handle this discrepancy would be greatly appreciated.

      Best regards,

      Mukhtar

entry.title: SAp MMC not able to start
entry.content:
When I am trying to bring up the server, we are facing the following issue:
Cannot connect to the Service on USAWSCONW113.us.deloitte.comWeb Service error:29A connection with the server could not be establishedWinHttpSendRequest failed in plugin_winhttpfsend() 

I have followed the note 2010805, but it didn't resolve the issue.

entry.title: Fetch table content from a webpage in sap build process automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Need your expert's suggestion,

I’m building an automation in sap build process automation that needs to pull the exchange‑rate table from our bank’s website and update those rates into SAP S/4HANA.

Bank is not providing any API to fetch exchange rate.

As of now, I am using "Execute Command" to open a website and using keystroke to select the content of webpage.

Now I have to fetch exchange rate table from bank website and update the same in S/4 Hana, I tried multiple possible way like custom script, but somehow, I am not able to fetch the information. Kindly help.

entry.title: GOS PNG IN MM03 ERROR
entry.content:
Hi @everyone ,

I am currently working on project where i have to attach png images in mm03 ,

where i was able to attach it with pdf extension but when i tried to attach it as pdf it attach the file but it is corrupted file , anyone have face this before , that will be helpful , please respond as early as possible .

Please refer my previous blog for pdf attachment , i am using same program but i need to attach png/jpeg: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/facing-issue-in-gos-attachment-for-mm03/qaq-p/14139422

Thanks,

Sanket Gode.

entry.title: Fetch Destination configuration details from BTP in ABAP layer
entry.content:
We are configuring destinations in BTP environment in order to fetch details from External API. There is an additional section namely additional properties in destination configuration level where we can fill in relevant parameters along with its key.

In ABAP how can we fetch the same?

We are in ABAP Cloud environment. 

CL_HTTP_DESTINATION_PROVIDER=>CREATE_BY_CLOUD_DESTINATION is not bring the details related to additional properties.

Inside the same class, there is an usage of Class CL_CLOUD_DESTINATION however its API state is not released hence cannot be used independently in Cloud system.

Kindly help here.

entry.title: Issue CDN on Workzone Lauchpad with Referenced Fiori App - deploy on Cloud foundry
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

   We are facing issues with CDN ( Content Delivery Network ) on Workzone Lauchpad after deploy on Clound Foundry

    We  have an custom app that works great on BAS tests, but on dependencies we have this another central finance app:

"dependencies": {  "minUI5Version": "1.114.0",
"libs": {  "sap.fin.gl.lib.posting": {
"lazy": false
},

on BTP under HTML5 is Okay it was wrong, but after updating xs-app file they were solved so we have follow on xs-app:

  {
      "source": "^/resources/sap/fin/gl/lib/posting/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/fin_gl_post_lib/$1",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "destination": "MYDESTINATION"
    },
 
after adding it to Workzone Lauchpad it is still going to 
sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.136.2/resources/sap/fin/gl/lib/posting/library-preload.js   
Instead of going to the Backend to load this files.
 
We tried to add ResourceRoots like:
"resourceRoots": {
"sap.fin.gl.lib.posting": "./sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/fin_gl_post_lib"
},
 
But still going to wrong place.
 
Do you guys know how to fix it?
 
( its a mandatory requirement to have this app on BTP, We can not deploy it on backend )

@Wouter @FabioPagoti  any ideias? thankks

entry.title: Modify statement in a determination giving short dump, going in infinite loop.
entry.content:
I have a single determination in my behavior definition as follows,

determination setCountryCode on save { field Country; create; update; }

following is the implementation in behavior pool,

CLASS lhc_ZI_INVESTOR DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_abap_behavior_handler.
  PRIVATE SECTION.

    METHODS get_global_authorizations FOR GLOBAL AUTHORIZATION
      IMPORTING REQUEST requested_authorizations FOR zi_investor RESULT result.

    METHODS setcountrycode FOR DETERMINE ON save
      IMPORTING keys FOR zi_investor~setcountrycode.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lhc_ZI_INVESTOR IMPLEMENTATION.

METHOD setCountryCode.


    READ ENTITIES OF zi_investor IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY zi_investor
        FIELDS ( Country Mobile )
        WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
      RESULT DATA(lt_mobile).

    IF lt_mobile IS NOT INITIAL.

      LOOP AT lt_mobile ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_mobile>).

        IF <fs_mobile>-Country = 'India'.
          <fs_mobile>-Mobile = |+91 | & |{ <fs_mobile>-Mobile }|.
        ENDIF.

      ENDLOOP.

    ENDIF.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_investor IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY zi_investor
        UPDATE FIELDS ( Mobile )
        WITH VALUE #( FOR item IN lt_mobile ( %tky = item-%tky Mobile = item-Mobile ) ).

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

This modify statement at the end is somehow going in an infinte loop, how can I fix this, I saw one post but there, two determinations were calling each other, but here I only have a single determination, I also have a validation but that should not be relevant, please help, thanks.
